use_cases: Drag-and-drop file upload with visual card stacking interface
Multi-file upload preview with stacked card representation
Media library management with upload functionality
Document upload for SaaS applications and dashboards
Creative asset upload for creator tools platforms
ai_summary: StackedCardsUpload is a React component providing a visually appealing stacked card interface for file uploads. Built with Radix UI and class-variance-authority for consistent button styling, it offers a modern minimalist aesthetic with shadow effects and smooth hover transitions. The component is suitable for SaaS applications, media platforms, and e-commerce sites requiring drag-and-drop or click-to-upload functionality with visual feedback.
